problem: Segment/buildSegments/polylinePoints 偏離 design §4 無 amendment tag
resolution: accepted — design §4 加 [P2-refine] 註記(單點段落需 raw 座標畫 circle,{points:string} 不夠用;是 refinement 非 drift)

problem: zeroLineY pad 預設未寫;test 7 無 pinned 數值
rationale: 0 線與 polyline 座標系同 pad

problem: 第 4 個函式超出 design §12 的三函式清單
resolution: accepted — design §12 amend 為四函式(獨立單測價值 > inline;R1-2 換算規則集中一處)

problem: loading 態 data-state="loading" 只在 breadth-panel 寫明,其餘 3 panel 未落實,MarketPage 整合測試 #5 依賴
changelog.test.ts:83 硬編 expect(CHANGELOG[0]?.version).toBe("0.18.2"),插入 0.19.0 後必紅,spec 未列
suggested_fix: spec 明列該 assertion 為「該變」
rationale: 宣稱既有測試綠但漏了硬編 assert
resolution: accepted — 已驗證 changelog.test.ts:82-83 屬實;spec 補「該變」清單(鐵則 E:事前標為該變的 assertion 可改)

problem: claim: hidden attribute 被 .grid class 蓋掉,toBeHidden 會 fail
resolution: rejected_with_reason — 實測 frontend/node_modules/tailwindcss/preflight.css:391 有 [hidden]:where(:not([hidden='until-found'])){display:none !important},經 @import "tailwindcss"(index.css:1)引入;!important author rule 勝 .grid 一般宣告,hidden 慣例照 design §11 可行。reviewer 漏掉 Tailwind v4 preflight 內建此規則(round-2 design reviewer 已獨立確認同一行)

problem: root testid(amount-share / vol-ratio / classic-toggle)未寫進 design,只在 impl spec
resolution: accepted — design 補(impl spec 間已一致,純 traceability)

problem: selectors.ts 頭註「這 10 root data-testid」計數會過時
